title: Comforting Warm Ukrainian Pasta Baked
description: A creamy, comforting Ukrainian-inspired baked pasta dish featuring molten ice cream and a pasta-water-emulsion. This dish is low-sodium-friendly and perfect for a weeknight dinner.
instructions: Cook the pasta according to the package instructions until al dente, then set aside.
In a large mixing bowl, combine the melted butter, garlic powder, paprika, and salt-free seasoning blend.
Add the cooked pasta to the bowl and toss to coat with the butter mixture.
In a separate bowl, whip the ice cream until it's light and fluffy.
Add the whipped ice cream to the pasta and toss until the pasta is well coated.
Transfer the pasta mixture to a baking dish and top with chopped dill and scallions.
Pour the water over the pasta mixture and cover the dish with aluminum foil.
Bake for 25 minutes, then remove the foil and continue baking for an additional 5-7 minutes, or until the top is golden brown.
Remove the dish from the oven and let it cool for a few minutes before serving.
